title: Encoder-Decoder Architecture for Machine Translation
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of translating a sentence from a source language to a target language using a neural encoder-decoder model with attention.
relationships: Input is processed sequentially by Encoder
Encoder final hidden state becomes the initial Context Vector for Decoder
Attention uses Encoder states to weight relevance for each Decoder step
Decoder generates output words one at a time using its own hidden state and the weighted context
